TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Panama, title = Panama, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Panama} }

S.FORM: Panama Itini i 9 00 N, 80 00 W, noNotimolan Amilika ko Panama. Polong no sekalay i 75,420 sq km "saka 118 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 74,340 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 1,080 sq km " Polong i 3,705,246 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 30.50%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 43.60%, malo no roma to a sera 25.90%. siyoto O ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakacecay ko safaw 3 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Juan Carlos Varela , patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 1 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: panama itini i * ** n, ** ** w, no~uno~utimo~u…ĺan ami…ĺika ko~u panama. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i **,*** s* km "saka *** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, **,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i *,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i saka ¶…ô ¶aj ko~u safaw * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i *o~u~uan ¶ar…ĺo~us b~var…ô…ĺa , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Panama Itini i 9 00 N, 80 00 W, noNotimolan Amilika ko Panama. Polong no sekalay i 75,420 sq km "saka 118 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 74,340 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 1,080 sq km " Polong i 3,705,246 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 30.50%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 43.60%, malo no roma to a sera 25.90%. siyoto O ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakacecay ko safaw 3 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Juan Carlos Varela , patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 1 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

" "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, **,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i *,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i saka ¶…ô ¶aj ko~u safaw * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i *o~u~uan ¶ar…ĺo~us b~var…ô…ĺa , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
